briefs.title: Mental Health Regulation Amended to Add Form 5 Under BC Mental Health Act
briefs.summary: BC Reg. 234/2025 amends the Mental Health Regulation (B.C. Reg. 233/99) by adding a new Form 5, effective December 15, 2025, under the Mental Health Act.
briefs.action_required: Review the new Form 5 and update any mental health intake or documentation processes to include it.

key_dates.label: BC Mental Health Regulation Form 5 amendment takes effect
